title: HOWGO Dog Rope Toy,Dog Bungee Chaser 100% Sheepskin,Sheep Smell Tug Toy for All Breeds (Black, Long without Ball)
features: [100% REAL AUS SHEEPSKIN] The bungee chaser toy is made from 100% real sheepskin imported from AUS. The climbing-grade bungee webbing, which is strong and pliable, ensures long-lasting durability. The tennis ball is made from non-toxic rubber, which is flexible, secure, and comforting for your dog's teeth.

[EXTRA ENERGY COMSUMPTION] The bungee chaser toy can help release dogs‘ extra energy, satisfy their physiological needs, and provide mental stimulation, which keeps your dog from feeling bored and anxious

[MENTAL & PHYSICAL EXERCISE] Dogs are high-intelligence animals that require physical and mental stimulation to keep happy. The chaser toy is excellent for stimulating prey drive and building motivation in puppies and adult dogs alike.
[SOFT & FURRY] The real smell of sheepskin heightens your dog's interest in this toy so as to stimulate the nature of hunting. The fur is irresistibly enticing to most dogs.
[NOT A CHEW TOY] Chase toys are meant for interactive tugging between you and your dog only. We strongly recommend that you don't allow your dog to keep the toy after the interaction has finished.
description: Product Description Some customers may complain about mouthful fur but don’t worry. That’s the feature of true natural sheepskin & fur, and it is also durable as expected. Compared with those artificial toys, your pup can actually bite off something without worrying about getting sick. Making pups bite the main part of the toy can efficiently reduce fur loss, and extend its service time. Description: If your dog is motivated as much by fetching as they are by tugging, this bungee chaser toy is an absolute best choice. Made from real medical-grade sheepskin and finished with a sturdy nylon webbing and padded handle, this chaser toy is excellent for stimulating prey drive and building drive in puppies and adult dogs alike. The sheepskin agility tug is not only an excellent reward but also perfect for teaching striking, gripping and tugging. The soft handle is padded with a waterproof fabric loop for easy gripping. The real sheepskin helps clean your dog‘s teeth. The bungee chaser toy is available in two versions: with or without a rubber ball at the end. Features: Bungee reduces the jarring of the dog's neck and handler's shoulder. The handle is made from strands of climbing-grade bungee webbing, durable enough for the strongest tuggers. With 100% AUS sheepskin and a non-toxic natural rubber ball, it ensures safety and quality. The toy is designed for interactive play and should only be used with supervision. The toy is strongly recommended by professional dog trainers to stimulate prey drive and build drive in dogs. The toy is available in two different versions: with or without a tennis ball. Handle is available in four colors, black, green, purple, and orange. Fur part is available in two lengths, coming in 0.33ft and 0.26ft for medium and large dogs.
